header.title: Hi, I'm Michael
header.description: Multiplatform application developer with a focus on modern interfaces, UI/UX design, and frontend and mobile development.

featured.title: Discover Castilla-La Mancha
featured.description: Android mobile application developed in Kotlin aimed at centralizing and facilitating access to tourist information about Castilla-La Mancha. It includes user authentication, navigation by province, PDF guide downloads, and a community forum with real-time data.

portfolio.title: Professional Portfolio
portfolio.description: Development of my own portfolio as a personal digital product. Modular architecture, product-oriented design, technical SEO, accessibility, and performance. Basis for professional presentation and project development.

python.title: Python Learning Project
python.description: Ongoing project focused on progressive learning of Python and the creation of small practical solutions. Focused on reinforcing logic, data structures, and basic automation as part of my technical development.

skills.title: Skills & Tools
skills.description: Technologies and tools I have worked with in real projects, both academic and personal.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I am a multiplatform application developer interested in creating modern, functional and well-designed digital experiences, both for web and mobile applications.
about.p2: I focus on quality, detail and software optimization. I enjoy transforming ideas into solid products with carefully crafted interfaces and solutions that provide real value to users.

contact.title: Shall we talk?
contact.description: I am looking for my first professional opportunity as a developer. If you think my profile could be a good fit for your team or project, I would be happy to hear from you.
contact.microcopy: Quick response · No commitment · Direct conversation

profile.role: Multiplatform application developer · Web · Mobile · Software
profile.description: Application developer focused on building real digital products. Progressive specialization in modern web development, mobile applications, and software architecture. Interested in professional environments where I can grow technically, add value, and participate in quality projects with real impact.

bullets: Comprehensive management of the used vehicle department, coordinating commercial, operational, and administrative processes.
Optimization of internal processes aimed at operational efficiency and improving the customer experience.
Activation and development of associated products and services, customer loyalty, and portfolio expansion.
Vehicle appraisal, market analysis, and definition of sales strategies.
Coordination of commercial campaigns and customer acquisition actions.
Administrative management for companies in the telecommunications sector (Orange and Movistar).
Organization and control of internal processes and workflows.
Operational planning, goal tracking, and interdepartmental coordination.
Organization of commercial campaigns and promotional activities.
Direct and online sale of real estate.
Real estate appraisal and market analysis.
Management of purchase and sale transactions.

items.name: Discover Castilla-La Mancha
